page_title: Groundwork of EVANGELION The Movie Digest
text:
is an artbook published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 23 April 2021. It features the original drawings of the films Evangelion: Death and Rebirth and The End of Evangelion.

Overview

The artbook includes scenes drawn for the theatrical version of "DEATH" from the film "DEATH & REBIRTH" and scenes drawn for the theatrical version of "AIR" from the film "THE END OF EVANGELION". It is a special digest version with newly found original drawings added in full color. The cover was illustrated by Tadashi Hiramatsu. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gZ0000803/
